_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of structured response frameworks (e.g. MITRE ATT&CK, Lockheed Martin Kill Chain, Diamond Model).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split design, cross-validation, evaluation metric selection, and the conditions under which each metric is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.452), OP-K-001 (OP, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.551). Shared vocabulary: [frameworks, knowledge, model]. DCWF-only terms [att, chain, ck, diamond, kill, lockheed] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, evaluation, metric] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.843 (P=0.845, R=0.841). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.2%). "Knowledge of structured response frameworks (e.g. MITRE ATT&CK, Lockheed Martin" and "Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.489 < STS 0.551 (gap -0.061). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [att, chain, ck] and [appropriate, conditions, cross] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [frameworks, knowledge, model]. DCWF-only: [att, chain, ck, diamond, kill, lockheed]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, conditions, cross, design, evaluation, metric].
